title: Four PhD Positions in NLP, AI and LLM Security
alt_start_date_window: starting dates after summer 2026 also possible
funding: Fully funded (Danish academic staff agreements, salary + employment)
eligibility: Relevant MSc degree (CS, SE, ML, AI, Computational Linguistics, or related)

Experience with modern NLP methods including transformer models
Preference: prior experience in NLP, LLM architectures, security, privacy, safety, or robustness
notes: FOUR PhD positions — competitive cohort intake. Bjerva is a multilingual NLP + LLM security researcher. Aalborg Copenhagen campus (NOT Aalborg main). Project description is REQUIRED — not optional — so this is the differentiating doc.
